source.multipart_basis: Baja India (electric variant) HV enclosures are IP67-rated bolted/welded aluminum boxes with a removable lid for service. Decomposition follows typical practice: welded base, four welded walls, a bolted removable lid riding on an EPDM gasket, an HV interconnect feedthrough bulkhead plate, internal busbar mounting rails, cable gland plates for LV/comms harness exits, a low-profile ventilation grate cover, and six chassis mounting feet matching the M8 bolt pattern. Speculative at the level of panel sub-splits; load magnitudes, material, gasket spec, and pass/fail thresholds are preserved from the single-body brief.

full_prompt:
Design the HV battery enclosure for a student-built electric off-road recreational vehicle. Per a governing structural-demonstration rulebook, the electric variant carries a high-voltage tractive battery (nominal 72 V, capacity 60 Ah => 4.3 kWh, total pack mass 35 kg) sealed inside a structural enclosure rated IP67, mounted behind the driver inside the cage. Enclosure shall be a welded monolithic aluminum 6082-T6 box, E = 70 GPa, yield = 250 MPa, ultimate = 290 MPa, density = 2700 kg/m^3. Overall bounding box 500 mm (X) x 300 mm (Y) x 250 mm (Z), wall thickness to be sized. Mounting: 6x M8 Grade 8.8 bolts through frame brackets. Load cases (electric-variant subset of standard off-road chassis load factors): (R1) Front impact 4 g applied to the full 35 kg pack: 4 x 35 x 9.81 = 1,374 N +X direction into the cells; max von Mises in enclosure walls <= yield / 1.25 = 200 MPa. (R2) Side impact 3 g: 3 x 35 x 9.81 = 1,030 N +Y; max von Mises <= 200 MPa. (R3) Rollover 2 g vertical + roof crush: 2 x 35 x 9.81 = 687 N vertical; max von Mises <= 200 MPa. (R4) IP67 qualification requires a gasket-sealed lid: the bolted lid interface must maintain compression on an EPDM gasket (nominal 5 mm initial thickness, compression 25%, E_gasket 5 MPa) across all load cases; lid-to-box edge gap <= 0.1 mm under worst-case inertial loading. (R5) Enclosure mass (excluding cells) <= 7 kg. (R6) Rear-impact 3 g: 3 x 35 x 9.81 = 1,030 N -X; max von Mises <= 200 MPa. (R7) First modal frequency >= 40 Hz. (R8) Tractive-system nominal voltage <= 96 V DC (electric-variant rule). Primary verification: structural FEA (linear static x4 cases) + gasket contact FEA for R4 + modal for R7. Vibration secondary via R7. Thermal, fluid, radiation explicitly NOT required. Deliverables: STEP AP242 welded enclosure (single FEA body), weld map, gasket spec, and a report listing enclosure mass in kg, max von Mises per load case, max lid gap in mm, first modal frequency in Hz.

--- ASSEMBLY RECONFIGURATION ---
This design is delivered as a multi-part welded/bolted aluminum assembly closed by a gasketed bolted lid. Speculated families: (A) base / floor panel carrying 6 chassis mounting feet and internal cell-module pickups; (B) four side walls (B1 forward, B2 rear, B3 left, B4 right) TIG-fillet welded to base and to each other at corners; (C) removable top cover bolted to a perimeter gasket rail (EPDM 5 mm, 25% compression, E_gasket = 5 MPa); (D) HV interconnect feedthrough plate on the rear wall with insulating O-ring maintaining HV isolation; (E) internal busbar mounting rails carrying cell-module reaction into the long walls; (F) cable gland plates (LV/comms) bolted on side wall; (G) ventilation grate / pressure-relief cover bolted on the top cover; (H) six chassis mounting feet (M8 Grade 8.8) TIG-welded or through-bolted to the base. Interfaces: base<->walls welded; wall<->wall corners welded; top cover<->walls bolted with EPDM gasket (compression-only contact); feedthrough<->rear wall bolted, electrically isolated; busbar rails<->long walls bolted through threaded inserts; gland plate<->side wall bolted; vent cover<->top cover bolted; feet<->base welded or bolted with internal backing. FEM verification runs on the assembled model ONLY per fem_check_policy=assembled_only. Lid-gap check (R4) uses explicit gasket contact between the top cover C and the top rail of B walls; the 0.1 mm gap threshold is preserved. Inter-part DCR <= 1.0 under the governing case (worst of LC1/LC2/LC3/LC4). Load magnitudes, gasket spec, 7 kg mass cap, IP67 requirement, and all pass/fail thresholds are preserved verbatim from the monolithic brief.
short_prompt:
Design the HV battery enclosure for a student-built electric off-road recreational vehicle as a welded + bolted aluminum multi-part assembly. Per a governing structural-demonstration rulebook, the electric variant carries a HV tractive battery (nominal 72 V, 60 Ah = 4.3 kWh, pack mass 35 kg) sealed inside a structural enclosure rated IP67, mounted behind the driver inside the cage.

Material: Al 6082-T6 welded (E = 70 GPa, yield = 250 MPa, ultimate = 290 MPa, density 2700 kg/m^3). Outer bounding box 500 mm (X) x 300 mm (Y) x 250 mm (Z). Mounting: 6x M8 Grade 8.8 bolts through frame brackets. EPDM gasket (5 mm initial thickness, 25% compression, E_gasket 5 MPa).

LC1 front 4 g = 1374 N +X; max von Mises <= yield / 1.25 = 200 MPa. LC2 side 3 g = 1030 N +Y; max von Mises <= 200 MPa. LC3 rollover 2 g = 687 N vertical + roof crush; max von Mises <= 200 MPa. LC4 rear 3 g = 1030 N -X; max von Mises <= 200 MPa. Lid-to-box edge gap <= 0.1 mm under worst-case inertial loading (IP67 seal maintained). Enclosure mass (excluding cells) <= 7 kg. First modal frequency >= 40 Hz. Tractive-system nominal voltage <= 96 V DC.

requires_non_fea_solver.reason: TIG fillet welds at base-to-wall and corner seams are sized from FEA line-reactions using AWS D1.2 hand-calc; not a continuum FEA result.

prompt.title: Student off-road EV HV battery enclosure (multi-part welded/bolted assembly)
prompt.brief: 6082-T6 welded+bolted IP67 enclosure for 35 kg HV pack; survives 4/3/2/3 g triaxial loads with bolted EPDM-gasket lid. Multi-part: base (A), four walls (B1-B4), removable top cover (C), HV feedthrough plate (D), busbar rails (E), cable gland plates (F), ventilation cover (G), chassis mounting feet (H x6). FEM assembled-only; connection DCR <= 1.0; lid gap <= 0.1 mm.

load_cases.name: modal
load_cases.description: hard-mounted at 6 foot bolts, first frequency target >= 40 Hz

boundary_conditions.mounting: six M8 bolt bosses on part H fixed in all 6 DOF
boundary_conditions.internal_mass: 35 kg lumped and RBE3-coupled to cell-mount interior pickups on A and E
boundary_conditions.gasket_contact: EPDM gasket between C and B-top-rail modeled as explicit contact, compression-only, E_gasket = 5 MPa

output_format.body_count: multi-body (A + B1-B4 + C + D + E-rails + F-gland plates + G + H x6)

parts.name: base_plate
parts.role: structural floor carrying the 6 chassis-foot pickups and the cell-module mounting pattern

geometric_constraints.interface_to_feet: TIG fillet weld or through-bolt with internal backing

parts.name: side_wall_panel
parts.role: vertical sidewall; four instances (forward, rear, left, right)

geometric_constraints.top_edge_feature: EPDM gasket rail with threaded inserts for lid bolts

parts.name: top_cover
parts.role: removable gasketed lid providing IP67 seal and service access

parts.name: hv_interconnect_feedthrough_plate
parts.role: rear-wall bulkhead plate carrying the HV connector; electrically isolated

parts.name: busbar_mounting_rail
parts.role: internal rails carrying cell-module reactions into the long walls; keep busbars clear of wall interior

geometric_constraints.attachment: bolted to B-left/B-right via threaded inserts

parts.name: cable_gland_plate
parts.role: LV/comms harness exit plate with IP67 gland fittings

parts.name: ventilation_grate_cover
parts.role: pressure-relief / vent path cover on the top cover

geometric_constraints.ip_compatible_membrane: GORE or equivalent vent required to preserve IP67

parts.name: chassis_mounting_foot
parts.role: load-path foot welded or through-bolted to the base; carries the M8 chassis bolt

geometric_constraints.distribution: two per forward/rear region and one per side, so that no fewer than 3 feet react LC1/LC4 loads simultaneously

assembly_envelope.coordinate_system: X forward, Y left-right, Z vertical
assembly_envelope.interior_clear_volume_note: must accommodate the 35 kg pack, BMS, and busbars with clearance

pass_fail_criteria.description: Connection DCR across all inter-part interfaces (IF1..IF8) <= 1.0 under the governing load case.
TIG fillet-weld throat utilization at base-to-wall and wall-to-wall seams <= 1.0 using weld-zone allowable 200 MPa.

connection_modeling: TIG fillet welds as tied contact with line-reaction throat check
lid bolts as stiffness-equivalent CBUSH/MPC pairs with initial preload
gasket as compression-only contact, E_gasket = 5 MPa

interfaces.load_path: pack inertial reaction into base then into walls; primary LC1/LC2/LC4 shear path

interfaces.mediated_by: TIG fillet weld at vertical corner seam
interfaces.load_path: corner shear tie; prevents wall opening under LC1/LC4

interfaces.mediated_by: perimeter bolts (>=10) with EPDM gasket, compression-only contact
interfaces.load_path: LC3 -Z crush and LC1/LC2/LC4 overpressure; governs R4 lid-gap

interfaces.mediated_by: bolted with insulating O-ring and non-conductive sleeves
interfaces.load_path: HV connector reaction into rear wall; preserves electrical isolation
cell-module reaction into long walls; primary LC2 lateral path
negligible structural; maintains venting and IP67

interfaces.mediated_by: TIG fillet weld or through-bolt with internal backing
interfaces.load_path: primary reaction path from enclosure to chassis; governs LC1/LC4

fem_check_policy.rationale: Multi-panel welded+bolted IP67 enclosures are governed by lid-gasket behavior and weld-toe stress, both of which only emerge when the assembly is modeled as multi-body with contact. Single-body FEA would miss R4 entirely.

notes.why_multi_part: IP67 sealing requires a removable gasketed lid (cannot be monolithic) and student off-road electric variants fabricate the rest of the enclosure as a welded multi-panel aluminum box.
notes.speculation_caveats: Exact panel subdivision, busbar-rail count, and foot geometry are team-specific. Counts and dimensions are plausible defaults for 500x300x250 mm; no additional rulebook clauses are cited.

exclusions_explained.thermal_analysis: Pack thermal management is a separate EV gate.
exclusions_explained.fluid_analysis: IP67 qualification is a physical test; gap-based FEA is a proxy.
